items.caption: A graphic design of a rectangular sign with rounded corners, set against a blue background with horizontal stripes. the sign has a white border and is filled with a light beige background. on the sign, the words "smart fridge" are written in bold, capital letters. the font is sans-serif, with the word "smart" in a darker shade of brown and "fridge" in a lighter shade of brown. the text is centered on the sign, and the overall style of the image is modern and clean.
